vibe: Editorial, confident, data-forward, C-suite executive polish, objective

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-[#0A0A0A]

layout_spacing.grid_borders: Use border-collapse style layouts for data sections to expose the grid skeleton (Technical Look).

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#00227A] rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#0A0A0A] hover:text-white rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all

cards.dashboard: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E5] rounded-none shadow-none hover:shadow-sm transition-shadow
cards.marketing_bento: bg-[#F4F4F5] border-none rounded-none p-8 flex flex-col justify-between

inputs.default: border-b border-[#E5E5E5] bg-transparent rounded-none px-0 py-2 focus:border-[#002FA7] focus:ring-0 transition-colors placeholder:text-[#A1A1AA]

likert_scale.style: Flex container of 5 connected rectangular blocks. Default: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E5] text-[#52525B]. Selected: bg-[#002FA7] text-white border-[#002FA7]. Hover: bg-[#F4F4F5] for unselected.

radar_chart.style: Recharts RadarChart. Stroke: #002FA7 (2px). Fill: #002FA7 (15% opacity). Grids: straight lines (polygon), not circular, stroke: #E5E5E5. Dots: solid #002FA7.

marketing_landing.layout: Asymmetrical hero with overlapping elements. Large Chivo typography. Editorial bento grid for value props.

auth.layout: Split screen: 50% abstract architecture image, 50% stark white minimalist form with IBM Plex Sans inputs.

dashboard_shell.layout: Left sidebar (narrow, 240px, dark charcoal #0A0A0A bg with white text), top header (white, glassmorphism), main content area (off-white bg).

assessment_flow.layout: Centered maximum 800px width. Clear segmented progress bar at top. One question or one dimension per view to reduce cognitive load.

results_report.layout: Dashboard grid (Control Room mode). Massive hero number for AIM Index. Side-by-side radar chart and heatmap. Printable A4 layout optimization for 'Export to PDF' feeling.

motion.hover: Subtle and professional. Colors shift 1-2 shades darker. No bouncy or playful animations.

images.description: Abstract geometric data visualization for the main hero background or right-side hero graphic.
Premium printed corporate report on a concrete desk for the 'Personalized AIM Roadmap' feature section.
Modern concrete building with geometric facade for the Auth split-screen background.
Professional headshot for Super Admin or Consultant avatar.
Professional headshot for User or Employee avatar.

assets.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) - Use Duotone weight for marketing, Regular weight for dashboards. Highly professional, geometric.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='start-assessment-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use Inter or generic purple/teal gradients. Adhere to the strict Archetype 4 Swiss & High-Contrast palette.
Use Chivo for all Headings and IBM Plex Sans for body. Apply tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) to headings.
Dashboard must feel like a high-end data terminal (Swiss grid, 1px borders, dense). Do not round card corners; keep them sharp (rounded-none).
For the assessment Likert scale, do not use native radio buttons. Build a custom group of 5-7 rectangular selectable blocks.
Implement Recharts for the Radar Chart with strict #002FA7 lines and straight (polygon) grid edges.
Implement the Heatmap as a CSS Grid of squares changing background color based on the value.
Ensure the application layout strictly follows the grid spacing guidelines and uses the provided media URLs.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements as required.
